tasks.instruction: On Day 2, register for the cheapest beginner-level UX research workshop that costs no more than $150, completing the registration form with the specified attendee and dietary details.

tasks.instruction: On Day 1, find a keynote that starts at or after 10:00 AM with a rating of at least 4.5 stars, then bookmark it and set a reminder for 15 minutes before it starts.

tasks.instruction: Find the speaker named Alex Chen, filter their sessions to panels, and add the panel with the longest duration to your schedule, choosing in-person attendance if prompted.

target_names: Panel: Microservices vs. Monoliths — Making the Right Tradeoffs

tasks.instruction: From the Help & FAQ section, open an article about vegetarian lunch or catering options, then use its contact form to ask whether vegan and gluten-free lunch options are available on all three conference days, providing your name, email, and choosing the dietary requirements topic.

target_names: What lunch and catering options are available during the conference?

contact_form.name: Taylor Morgan
contact_form.message_example: Hi, will vegan and gluten-free lunch options be available on all three conference days?
